fields.label: First VRAM tile reserved for half-width text
fields.description: First background tile index (0-255) reserved for composed character-pair tiles. Must not overlap tiles used by the scene background (0 to 191 depending on the scene) or the UI/dialogue tiles (192-255).

fields.label: Last VRAM tile reserved for half-width text
fields.description: Last background tile index (inclusive) reserved for composed character-pair tiles. At most 64 tiles are used even if the range is larger.
